title: SignalingEnvelope
description: End-to-end signed envelope wrapping every WebRTC signaling frame after `JOIN_HANDSHAKE`. The signaling server forwards verbatim and verifies only shape + freshness; the receiving peer verifies the Ed25519 signature against the pinned `peerPubKey` (per `peer-identity.schema.json`) before consuming `payload`. Authoritative doctrine: `docs/architecture/signaling-envelope.md`. Fields excluded from the signature input: `signerId`, `sig`. Replay window: ±60 s on `iat`; per-`(signerId, sessionId)` ring buffer of 256 nonces.

payloadType.description: Closed enum; adding a value is an enum-lifecycle bump per `docs/architecture/enum-lifecycle-policy.md`.

payload.description: Inner message; per-kind shape is enforced by the consuming task's runtime schema, not this envelope.

signerId.description: Sender's `peerId` from `peer-identity.schema.json`. The signaling server uses this to look up the room slot row; the receiver uses it to look up the pinned public key.

sig.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical-JSON encoding of `[schemaVersion, payloadType, payload, nonce, iat, sessionTokenHash]`. Base64url-encoded, 64 raw bytes (86 url-safe chars without padding).

nonce.description: 16-byte CSPRNG nonce, base64url-encoded (22 url-safe chars without padding). Tracked in the receiver's per-(signerId, sessionId) ring buffer of 256 entries.

iat.description: Sender's wall-clock at envelope mint, milliseconds since epoch. Validated within ±60 s of receiver wall-clock.

sessionTokenHash.description: sha256(canonicalJson(session-token)) of the active session token (per `session-token.schema.json`), base64url-encoded, 32 raw bytes (43 url-safe chars without padding). The signaling server stores the hash and pre-filters envelopes that do not match the active session.
